project.name: Clawvato
project.description: Business operating system for solo technical founders — memory-powered AI agent across Slack, email, calendar, Drive, meetings, and Claude Code. Brain Platform is the core intelligence system.

1.name: Build the Agent
1.description: Reactive agent that responds when asked. Slack, memory, Google, Fireflies, sweeps, tasks.

2.name: Build the Brain
2.description: Smart memory plugin: embeddings, hybrid search, reranking, dedup, clustering, journaling, reflection. Agent-agnostic.

3.name: Build the Nervous System
3.description: Brain Platform: multi-brain architecture, inter-brain feeds, concept-aware extraction, sidecar connectors. Migration complete, feeds system live.

4.name: Build the Judgment
4.description: Autonomous workflows — CRM, project tracking, proactive surfacing. Good autonomous decisions.

E.name: Proactive Intelligence
E.notes: Connectors + sidecar in brain-platform. 15-min sweep frequency. Brain-specific extraction prompts.

F.name: Security Hardening
F.notes: Training wheels removed. Pre-tool security checks + output sanitization remain.

G.name: GitHub + Self-Development
G.notes: Designed (three-gate safety model). Deferred until Phase 3/4 stable.

J.name: Hybrid Architecture
J.notes: Code deleted in S27. CC-Native is the only engine.

M.name: Background Sweeps
M.notes: Sidecar + connectors live in brain-platform. 15-min Slack/Gmail/Fireflies sweeps.

O.name: CC-Native Engine
O.notes: Claude Code as core engine via Channels.

Q.name: Brain Platform
Q.notes: Multi-brain with inter-brain feeds. Migration complete. Feeds system live (raw + synthesized). Per-entity brain architecture under discussion.

R.name: Inter-Brain Feeds
R.notes: Generic feed system: raw + synthesized modes, cycle prevention, origin tracking. comms↔primary↔dev all connected.

infrastructure.local: macOS, .mcp.json runs brain-platform as local stdio process with Railway DB URL + BRAIN_CONFIG_DIR
railwayServices: clawvato (thin agent — task poller + event feed)
infrastructure.database: Railway managed Postgres (automatic backups, pgvector, tsvector)
infrastructure.deployMethod: brain-platform: railway up (manual). clawvato: GitHub auto-deploy from cc-native-engine branch.
infrastructure.maxPlan: Claude Max subscription — CC-native engine costs $0
infrastructure.brainPlatform: github.com/andrewcovato/brain-platform — core intelligence on Railway. brain-platform-production.up.railway.app
infrastructure.brainPlatformAuth: Bearer token via MCP_AUTH_TOKEN env var

brains.primary: Business intelligence — ~185 memories, 12 clusters. Clients, deals, strategy, relationships. Receives feeds from comms + dev.
brains.dev: Technical context — ~90 memories, 4 clusters. Architecture decisions, patterns, bugs, project state. Feeds milestones to primary.
brains.comms: Communications — ~50 memories, growing. Email, Slack, meetings. Feeds commitments/follow-ups/outcomes to primary. 15-min sweep frequency.

goals: Inter-brain feed system — generic knowledge sharing (DONE)
Fix synthesized feed JSON parsing (prompt tweak)
Historical backfill — 5 months of email/Slack/Fireflies into comms brain

S10.name: Memory Excellence
workstreams: WS1: Memory scoping — soft signals (domain 1.3x, surface 1.1x boost)
WS2: Write-time dedup — ADD/UPDATE/NOOP/DELETE via Haiku
WS3: Embedding upgrade — nomic-embed-text-v1.5 (Matryoshka 384d)
WS4: Cross-encoder reranking — local ms-marco-MiniLM ($0, 48x faster)
WS5: Memory instructions — comprehensive prompt + XML-tagged context
Bonus: Entity-hop traversal, domain taxonomy, scoping refactor

S24.name: Smart Plugin Migration
workstreams: Phase 0: Module restructure (798→142 line entrypoint)
Phase 1-5: Full intelligence migration to plugin
Conversation journaling, HDBSCAN clustering, agent wiring

S25.name: Nervous System — Sidecar Rebuild + Task UX
workstreams: Journal hook + insights scratch pad + brief auto-update
Sonnet extraction upgrade + plugin sync command
Sidecar rebuild: tiered sweeps, event feed, -685 lines
Pub/Sub webhook spec

S26.name: Brain Platform Migration
workstreams: brain-platform repo (36 files, ~4,700 lines), recursive concept-aware HDBSCAN
Deploy to Railway + cutover from brain-platform (old: clawvato-memory)
Comms brain + sidecar wiring (3 connectors: Slack, Gmail, Fireflies)
Kill old sidecar — task poller only in clawvato
Thin clawvato — 9,822 lines deleted (memory, sweeps, hybrid agent, drive-sync)
npm package: @andrewcovato/brain-platform@1.1.0 published
Decommission brain-platform (old: clawvato-memory) Railway service
Inter-brain feed system: raw + synthesized modes, cycle prevention, 5 connections
Brain-specific extraction prompts wired into ingest pipeline

S28.name: Per-Entity Brain Architecture
goals: Dynamic brain creation from YAML templates
All channels → all brains with entity-based filtering
Deep context per entity vs broad shallow coverage
S28.dependsOn: S27 backfill complete + feed system stable

lastSession.type: Migration complete + inter-brain feeds + comms brain live
keyDecisions: Unified feed model: raw + synthesized modes, same code path
Cycle prevention via origin_brain exclusion in feed queries
Feed sweep every 30min, per-connection intervals (1h raw, 6h synthesized)
No automatic cross-brain retirement — dedup + consolidation handle conflicts
Brain-specific extraction prompts wired into ingest pipeline
Historical backfill paused — need context-down working first
Per-entity brain architecture proposed (1 brain per client/project)

Test context-down with primary→comms feed, then run 1-week backfill

thingsNotToRedo: DON'T REBUILD WHAT COMES NATIVELY WITH CLAUDE CODE
Don't hardcode prompts in TypeScript — all prompts in config/prompts/*.md (or brain.yaml)
Always take the pain now — build for durability, no short-term hacks
Always build for the future — adopt Anthropic tech as it ships
Bug reports → investigate + plan + confirm before coding
Plan before coding — don't jump straight to implementation
Check memory before researching — don't explore when the answer is in context
Brain stores intelligence + source pointers, NOT content. Source APIs store content.
Concepts are per-brain config, not global. Each brain has different understanding of the world.
Default brain_id = 'primary' — business intelligence is the majority, dev is the minority
Recursive HDBSCAN: let HDBSCAN decide when to stop recursing, don't force fixed depth
Composite clustering text: [concept_type] entities: content — separates structure from semantics
Cluster identity preservation: match new→old by centroid similarity, don't wipe IDs every re-cluster
postgres.js tagged templates silently drop ::vector cast on INSERT — use INSERT then UPDATE
Entity parsing: DB stores entities as JSON string, always parse defensively
Always soft-delete memories (valid_until = NOW()), never hard DELETE
MCP SDK Server.connect() is 1:1 — new Server+Transport per HTTP request
Journal hook uses /ingest REST endpoint (not MCP) — fire-and-forget
Sonnet > Haiku for extraction quality
Two schedulers: brain (consolidation, reflection, clustering, decay, feeds) and agent (user tasks)
Sweeps: HWM + dedup = two-layer idempotency
Feed query must check BOTH concept_type AND type columns (extraction stores in type, not always concept_type)
Non-blocking startup for Railway health checks — use setTimeout, not await, for heavy startup work
Don't backfill historical data without context-down working — orphaned commitments rot
